drl:
rule "R0"
salience 3
when
    $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insertLogical(new T2($p0_0.getF2(), true));
    insert(new T1($b0_0_0, $b0_0_0, "beta", false));
end
rule "R1"
salience 4
when
    T2(f0 < 9, f1 not in (true))
    T2()
    T2(f0 >= 0.5, $b1_2_0 : f1, $b1_2_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f0 not in (11, 3), f3 == true, $b2_0_0 : f2)
then
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f0 > 5, f0 >= 12, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($p3_0.getF2(), 6.0, "beta", true));
    insertLogical(new T2($p3_0.getF2(), false));
end
rule "R4"
salience -2
when
    T0(f1 < -1, f0 >= -1000000007, !(f0 <= 9), $b4_0_0 : f0)
    T0(f2 in (4.5), f2 != -2.0 || f0 <= 9, $b4_1_0 : f1, $b4_1_1 : f2)
    accumulate( T0(f1 in (1.0, -3.0), $s4_2 : f0); $a4_2 : average($s4_2) )
then
    insert(new T1($b4_0_0, 0.0, "b", false));
end
